segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good morning. This is my first time here.

segments.speaker: Volunteer
segments.text: We're glad you're here. Are you looking for the service?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes. I just moved to Boston, and I wanted to visit a church nearby.

segments.speaker: Volunteer
segments.text: Of course. The service starts in about ten minutes.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Is there a place visitors usually sit, or can I sit anywhere?

segments.speaker: Volunteer
segments.text: You can sit anywhere. If you'd like, I can introduce you to our newcomer team afterward.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be nice. I'm still getting settled, so it would be good to meet people slowly.

segments.speaker: Volunteer
segments.text: Absolutely. Do you prefer to sit near the back today?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, that would help me follow along without feeling too visible.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. I appreciate the warm welcome.
